field_contract.name: The public, case-folded spelling.
field_contract.kind: function, primitive, or macro from the public-surface authority.
field_contract.arity: An exact required/optional/rest/max object when a shipped code object is authoritative; otherwise an explicit unresolved object. Unresolved arity blocks help delivery.
field_contract.signature: Optional human-readable signature. Null means no separate signature authority exists; argument names must never be invented from counts.
field_contract.docstring: Optional documentation string. Null means absent; source comments are not silently promoted to API text.
field_contract.authority: The SHA-bound source of kind and, where exact, the library plus ordinal and code-object bytes that prove arity.

unresolved_authority_rule.native: Native arity must eventually come from the native-function registry rather than a duplicated help table.
unresolved_authority_rule.macro: Evaluator and macro arity needs its own generated authority; source-text guessing is forbidden.
unresolved_authority_rule.delivery_gate: No ide-help or device-side metadata delivery may claim complete parameter help while any public record has unresolved arity.

delivery.wave2: Deterministic SHA-bound host index and receipt only; no resident, shelf, symbol, Namepool, Directory, island, installer, or overlay bytes.
delivery.device: Deferred with ide-help behind C2 after the single L65S-v4 attempt failed its stage-slice and fixed-overlay gates.
delivery.media_rule: A future device index must remain in the reset-persistent, product-identity-bound Attic artifact. A product-D81-only side file is forbidden by the one-swap contract.

gates: records are canonical-JSON sorted and unique by name
public kind comes from a named public authority
exact arity is decoded from the exact SHA-bound code object
anonymous container entries cannot satisfy public metadata
signature and docstring stay null until an explicit authority supplies them
unresolved records are counted and block complete help claims
all current capacity deltas are zero
claim_limit: This contract proves a deterministic host projection and identifies its unresolved arity authorities. It does not claim an on-device index, complete parameter help, shelf capacity, or a shipped Wave-3 help module.
